title: AU Small Finance Bank is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Senior)

jsonLd.title: AU Small Finance Bank is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with AU Small Finance Bank! We are hiring a Credit Analyst for our Bhubaneswar team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About AU Small Finance Bank:
AU Small Finance Bank is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Referral bonus program
• Flexible working hours
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Bhubaneswar, Odisha, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with AU Small Finance Bank!
